name: 法玛斯 | 喷焰者
descriptionEn: A cheap option for cash-strapped players, the FAMAS effectively fills the niche between more expensive rifles and the less-effective SMGs. This memento from Cache has been painted with a shark's mouth in the style of aircraft nose art. Jester's dead
descriptionZh: 给手头紧的玩家的一个廉价选择，法玛斯有效地填补了昂贵的步枪和杀伤力较低的微型冲锋枪之间的空缺。 这把来自死城之谜的纪念武器以飞机机头艺术为风格，使用鲨鱼的嘴巴进行了涂装。 小丑已死
